variant_name: 陆姝仪 — 登门拜访状态
trigger: 高府门外，正式拜访被拒

appearance_delta.distinguishing_features: 正式拜访的端庄姿态，眼神期待又忐忑

visual_reference: refined Chinese beauty in elegant light blue hanfu standing at mansion entrance, formal hairstyle with ornaments, composed yet anxious expression, proper posture with slight nervousness, traditional visiting attire, daylight outdoor setting
